'''鈭歫-z-k-ch''' ('''kajazkechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quire|quire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quire|quire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-z-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajazkechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazkechoko|thijazkechoko]] || [[word:jijazkechoko|jijazkechoko]] || [[word:shijazkechoko|shijazkechoko]] || [[word:kijazkechoko|kijazkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazkechoko|thuthujazkechoko]] || [[word:jujujazkechoko|jujujazkechoko]] || [[word:shushujazkechoko|shushujazkechoko]] || [[word:kukujazkechoko|kukujazkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazkechoko|thujazkechoko]] || [[word:jujazkechoko|jujazkechoko]] || [[word:shujazkechoko|shujazkechoko]] || [[word:kujazkechoko|kujazkechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazkechoko|thojazkechoko]] || [[word:jojazkechoko|jojazkechoko]] || [[word:shojazkechoko|shojazkechoko]] || [[word:kojazkechoko|kojazkechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazkechoko|thojazkechoko]] || [[word:jojazkechoko|jojazkechoko]] || [[word:shojazkechoko|shojazkechoko]] || [[word:kojazkechoko|kojazkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jazkechoko|th忙jazkechoko]] || [[word:j忙jazkechoko|j忙jazkechoko]] || [[word:sh忙jazkechoko|sh忙jazkechoko]] || [[word:k忙jazkechoko|k忙jazkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazkechoko|thathajazkechoko]] || [[word:jajajazkechoko|jajajazkechoko]] || [[word:shashajazkechoko|shashajazkechoko]] || [[word:kakajazkechoko|kakajazkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazkechoko|thajazkechoko]] || [[word:jajazkechoko|jajazkechoko]] || [[word:shajazkechoko|shajazkechoko]] || [[word:kajazkechoko|kajazkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazkechoko|thajazkechoko]] || [[word:jajazkechoko|jajazkechoko]] || [[word:shajazkechoko|shajazkechoko]] || [[word:kajazkechoko|kajazkechoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
